verses.text: In the first year of Cyrus, the LORD stirs the king's spirit to fulfil Jeremiah's word, and he proclaims liberty for the exiles to go up and build God's house, bidding their neighbours help them. God moves a pagan king's heart to keep His promise. No throne is beyond His reach when His time to restore has come.

In the first year of Cyrus, the LORD stirs the king's spirit to fulfil Jeremiah's word, and he proclaims liberty for the exiles to go up and build God's house, bidding their neighbours help them. God moves a pagan king's heart to keep His promise. No throne is beyond His reach when His time to restore has come.

In the first year of Cyrus, the LORD stirs the king's spirit to fulfil Jeremiah's word, and he proclaims liberty for the exiles to go up and build God's house, bidding their neighbours help them. God moves a pagan king's heart to keep His promise. No throne is beyond His reach when His time to restore has come.

In the first year of Cyrus, the LORD stirs the king's spirit to fulfil Jeremiah's word, and he proclaims liberty for the exiles to go up and build God's house, bidding their neighbours help them. God moves a pagan king's heart to keep His promise. No throne is beyond His reach when His time to restore has come.

All whose spirit God had raised — heads of Judah and Benjamin, priests and Levites — rise to go up, and their neighbours strengthen their hands with goods and gifts. God prepares the hearts He calls. The willingness to answer His summons is itself His work within us.

All whose spirit God had raised — heads of Judah and Benjamin, priests and Levites — rise to go up, and their neighbours strengthen their hands with goods and gifts. God prepares the hearts He calls. The willingness to answer His summons is itself His work within us.

Cyrus brings out the temple vessels Nebuchadnezzar had carried off, and counts them all out to be taken back to Jerusalem. What the enemy seized is restored to its place. God preserves what is His through the long years of captivity and brings it home again.
